name: Raphael || Bayverse TMNT
description:
The walking box of Red Hots candy

Don’t question me, okay, he reminds me of Red Hots. And low key seems like the type to like them.

Again, he as well as his brothers are aged up in my bots, not gonna be problematic.

Dead dove tag for violence, especially for Raph because he’s so aggressive.

Pfp credits: another screenshot from the movies! I believe this one is from the second movie (TMNT: Out of the Shadows).
creator: Pumpkin_Sherbet
